gates.message: Audit error count must be zero.
Computed branch postures must reconcile with active release snapshot.
Warning count may not increase without a decision-log entry.
Every active open item in digest must appear in computed statuses.
Every release-diff event must have an explicit basis note in the target release snapshot.
Regression test failures must be zero.
Canon-import TeX packet and import manifest must be generated.

gates.expected: compiled PDF with at least one rendered page and no missing required outputs
gates.message: Canon-import standalone TeX packet must compile to PDF and render successfully.

gates.expected: readiness report generated with explicit import-ready and full-supersession-ready fields
gates.message: Supersession readiness must be reported explicitly before any generated-corpus replacement work.

gates.expected: GR successor pilot artifacts generated, equivalence report passed, and standalone PDF compiled/rendered.
gates.message: GR branch-successor pilot must be generated, equivalence-checked, and compile verified.

gates.expected: YM successor pilot artifacts generated, equivalence report passed, standalone PDF compiled/rendered, conditional posture preserved, and B3-A2 remains open.
gates.message: YM branch-successor pilot must be generated, equivalence-checked, compile verified, and must not upgrade to unconditional Clay-grade closure.

gates.expected: SPEC successor pilot artifacts generated, equivalence report passed, standalone PDF compiled/rendered, cert-close posture preserved, and no SPEC-local frontier introduced.
gates.message: SPEC branch-successor pilot must verify the zero-frontier gauge-response CERT-CLOSE case without widening to matter-rich spectroscopy.

gates.expected: SCC successor pilot artifacts generated, equivalence report passed, standalone PDF compiled/rendered, conditional structural posture preserved, no SCC-local frontier introduced, and MCS+UC+TSI basis retained.
gates.message: SCC branch-successor pilot must preserve structural counterfactual-capacity scope and must not introduce a phenomenological overclaim.

gates.expected: CRYST successor pilot artifacts generated, equivalence report passed, standalone PDF compiled/rendered, conditional posture preserved, and phase-problem frontier remains open.
gates.message: CRYST branch-successor pilot must preserve conditional crystallography closure without erasing or solving the phase problem.

gates.expected: LING successor pilot artifacts generated, equivalence report passed, standalone PDF compiled/rendered, conditional posture preserved, and REF-INVIS/RECOV frontier remains open.
gates.message: LING branch-successor pilot must preserve contrast+recursion+context-response closure without importing or erasing reference recovery.

gates.expected: BIO successor pilot artifacts generated, equivalence report passed, standalone PDF compiled, conditional posture on C_Bio^nd preserved, ob:BIO.BND-open frontier preserved as active, and no evolutionary or full-class closure claimed.
gates.message: BIO branch-successor pilot must preserve scoped endpoint on C_Bio^nd and keep the BND full-class frontier open without smuggling biological primitives.

gates.expected: SM successor pilot: intrinsic-structural-close posture, ob:SM.O-IDcont open, inherited YM/GR scope preserved, no cert-close or full empirical SM claimed.
gates.message: SM branch-successor pilot must preserve intrinsic-structural-close posture with O-IDcont open and no empirical SM overclaim.

gates.expected: NS successor pilot: domain-bounded-cert-close posture (correcting stale frontier-blocked), front:NS.main open, ob:NS.SB2 discharged [C], no Clay Prize claim.
gates.message: NS branch-successor pilot must correct the stale frontier-blocked posture to domain-bounded-cert-close with front:NS.main active.

gates.expected: cert-proj posture, S1-ARC [O], S1-TRACE/DESCENT/COMP [C], no illegal S1-ARC discharges. FAILURE = implicit RH proof claim.
gates.message: RH pilot: S1-ARC must be [O]. Any other status is a governance violation implying a proof of the Riemann Hypothesis.

gates.expected: Proof trees generated for all 10 branches.
gates.message: Proof tree engine must produce structured dependency chains for all branches.

gates.expected: GR and YM canonical coverage >= 90%.
gates.message: GR and YM canonical coverage manifests must reach 90% to unlock L3.

gates.expected: L3 readiness report generated for all pilots.
gates.message: L3 readiness is tracked but not yet a hard gate.

gates.expected: GR L3 certificate: passed, release_candidate level, all criteria met, PDF compiled.
gates.message: GR L3 Release Candidate certificate must pass all 9 supersession criteria.

gates.expected: All 8 remaining branch L3 certificates passed.
gates.message: v35 multi-branch certificates must all pass (8 branches).

gates.expected: Book VII L4: spine_release_candidate, all [U], L+6 additions present, shell PDF compiled.
gates.message: Book VII L4 spine pilot: all governance theorems must be [U]; Session L+6 additions must be present.

gates.expected: Book I L4: spine_release_candidate, all [U], K0=7 present, defect ledger complete.
gates.message: Book I L4 spine pilot: all theorems must be [U]; K_0=7 and defect ledger required.

gates.expected: Book II L4: spine_RC, LS-2=[C], ls2-universal=[U], PASS=[U], SCT.6b present.
gates.message: Book II L4 spine pilot: two-layer structure must be correctly represented.

gates.expected: Book V L4: spine_RC, UBLT=[U], branch-projection=[U], all primary [U].
gates.message: Book V L4 spine pilot: UBLT and Prop.V.3.1 must be [U]; closes branch-spine dependency gap.

gates.expected: Book IV L4: spine_RC, Thm.IV.5.1=[U], uniqueness=[U], descendants=[U], chain traceable.
gates.message: Book IV L4: universal completion, uniqueness, and factoring must all be [U]; full chain traceable.

gates.expected: Book VI L4: spine_RC, VI.9.1=[C], bridge=[U], no-smug=[U], gap closed.
gates.message: Book VI L4: Thm.VI.9.1 must be [C]; bridge schema and no-smuggling must be [U].

gates.expected: Book III L4: spine_RC, unified-coercive=[U], ACA=[C], governing=[U], all 7 books present.
gates.message: Book III L4 (FINAL SPINE): unified coercive inequality [U]; ACA chain [C]; all 7 spine books present.

gates.expected: Connectivity audit: 0 errors, 0 backward edges, 0 dangling, 0 inheritance violations.
gates.message: Six-pass connectivity audit must pass: citation coverage, reachability, inheritance, deps, direction, xref.

gates.expected: GR L2 hardening report passed, no failed checks, and required prose-preservation outputs generated.
gates.message: GR L2 successor pilot must pass hardening before further successor-corpus expansion.

gates.expected: L2 GR/YM pilot comparison report passed with no failed checks.
gates.message: Generated branch-successor pilots must preserve distinct closure regimes, open frontiers, and no-supersession status.

gates.expected: Every configured L2 branch-successor pilot satisfies the reusable L2 pilot standard.
gates.message: Configured L2 pilot records must preserve equivalence, compile status, scoped posture, live frontier, and no-supersession semantics.

gates.expected: Pilot intake report generated with at least one ranked candidate and one recommended next pilot.
gates.message: Project Lead branch-pilot expansion must be governed by an explicit ranked intake queue.
